scripts.install:all: npm install --legacy-peer-deps --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix backend install --legacy-peer-deps --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix frontend-next install --legacy-peer-deps --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix frontend install --legacy-peer-deps --no-audit --no-fund
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend-next run dev -- --host 0.0.0.0"
scripts.dev:next: concurrently "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend-next run dev -- --host 0.0.0.0"
scripts.dev:old: concurrently "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev -- --host 0.0.0.0"
